response.justification: Strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective founder), Linux/Unix familiarity, and a track record of mentoring through workshops and talks. However, the role explicitly requires German at C1 level and the candidate only lists Basic German, which is a hard blocker. Additionally, formal tech-lead/head-of-development experience leading interdisciplinary teams is not clearly demonstrated, and Python is not in the listed skill set despite being a desired technical skill.
strengths: Deep full-stack and polyglot engineering background with strong open-source and Linux orientation
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates architecture ownership and product vision
Proven mentorship and teaching ability via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
concerns: German only at Basic level — fails the C1 requirement
No explicit formal leadership or Head-of-Development role managing an interdisciplinary team
Python and UML not listed among skills; limited evidence of requirements management at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and open-source leadership
Lack of formal tech-lead/management track record
